name: profile-react-perf-lab
description: A/B lab measuring @sentry/react load overhead on a realistic, request-heavy profile page

scripts.build:baseline: npm run gen-assets && vite build --mode baseline --outDir dist/baseline --emptyOutDir
scripts.build:sentry: npm run gen-assets && vite build --mode sentry --outDir dist/sentry --emptyOutDir
scripts.build:sentry-eager: npm run gen-assets && vite build --mode sentry-eager --outDir dist/sentry-eager --emptyOutDir
scripts.build:all: npm run build:baseline && npm run build:sentry && npm run build:sentry-eager
scripts.build:no-sentry: npm run gen-assets && vite build --mode no-sentry --outDir dist/no-sentry --emptyOutDir
scripts.build:errors-only: npm run gen-assets && vite build --mode errors-only --outDir dist/errors-only --emptyOutDir
scripts.build:tracing: npm run gen-assets && vite build --mode tracing --outDir dist/tracing --emptyOutDir
scripts.build:tracing-replay: npm run gen-assets && vite build --mode tracing-replay --outDir dist/tracing-replay --emptyOutDir
scripts.build:matrix: npm run build:no-sentry && npm run build:errors-only && npm run build:tracing && npm run build:tracing-replay
